'''âf-j-j''' ('''fajaja''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:outbullshit|outbullshit]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-j-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:outbullshit|outbullshit]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âf-j-j
|-
! Lemma
| fajaja
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:fajajithi|fajajithi]] || [[word:fajajiji|fajajiji]] || [[word:fajajishi|fajajishi]] || [[word:fajaji|fajaji]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:fajajuthuth|fajajuthuth]] || [[word:fajajujuj|fajajujuj]] || [[word:fajajushush|fajajushush]] || [[word:fajaj|fajaj]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:fajajuthu|fajajuthu]] || [[word:fajajuju|fajajuju]] || [[word:fajajushu|fajajushu]] || [[word:fajaju|fajaju]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:fajajufuth|fajajufuth]] || [[word:fajajufuj|fajajufuj]] || [[word:fajajufush|fajajufush]] || [[word:fajajuf|fajajuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:fajajethe|fajajethe]] || [[word:fajajeje|fajajeje]] || [[word:fajajeshe|fajajeshe]] || [[word:fajaje|fajaje]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:fajajothoth|fajajothoth]] || [[word:fajajojoj|fajajojoj]] || [[word:fajajoshosh|fajajoshosh]] || [[word:fajaj|fajaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:fajajotho|fajajotho]] || [[word:fajajojo|fajajojo]] || [[word:fajajosho|fajajosho]] || [[word:fajajo|fajajo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:fajajofoth|fajajofoth]] || [[word:fajajofoj|fajajofoj]] || [[word:fajajofosh|fajajofosh]] || [[word:fajajof|fajajof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:fajajĂŠthĂŠ|fajajĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:fajajĂŠjĂŠ|fajajĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:fajajĂŠshĂŠ|fajajĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:fajajĂŠ|fajajĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:fajajathath|fajajathath]] || [[word:fajajajaj|fajajajaj]] || [[word:fajajashash|fajajashash]] || [[word:fajaj|fajaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:fajajatha|fajajatha]] || [[word:fajajaja|fajajaja]] || [[word:fajajasha|fajajasha]] || [[word:fajaja|fajaja]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:fajajafath|fajajafath]] || [[word:fajajafaj|fajajafaj]] || [[word:fajajafash|fajajafash]] || [[word:fajajaf|fajajaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:fajajasha|fajajasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gofajajasha|gofajajasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokifajajasha|gokifajajasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:fajajnĂŒsha|fajajnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gofajajnknĂŒsha|gofajajnknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokifajajnĂŒsha|gokifajajnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:fajajshĂ«sha|fajajshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofajajnkshĂ«sha|gofajajnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokifajajshĂ«sha|gokifajajshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:fajajrosha|fajajrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofajajnkrosha|gofajajnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokifajajrosha|gokifajajrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:fajajmusha|fajajmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gofajajnkmusha|gofajajnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifajajmusha|gokifajajmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:fajajsherasha|fajajsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gofajajnksherasha|gofajajnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokifajajsherasha|gokifajajsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:fajajngasha|fajajngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gofajajnkngasha|gofajajnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokifajajngasha|gokifajajngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:fajajyasha|fajajyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gofajajnkyasha|gofajajnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokifajajyasha|gokifajajyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:fajajyamasha|fajajyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gofajajnkyamasha|gofajajnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokifajajyamasha|gokifajajyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:fajajnĂŒshĂ«sha|fajajnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gofajajnknĂŒshĂ«sha|gofajajnknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokifajajnĂŒshĂ«sha|gokifajajnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:fajajnĂŒrosha|fajajnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofajajnknĂŒrosha|gofajajnknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokifajajnĂŒrosha|gokifajajnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fajajnĂŒmusha|fajajnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofajajnknĂŒmusha|gofajajnknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifajajnĂŒmusha|gokifajajnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:fajajshĂ«nĂŒsha|fajajshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gofajajnkshĂ«nĂŒsha|gofajajnkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokifajajshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokifajajshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:fajajshĂ«rosha|fajajshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofajajnkshĂ«rosha|gofajajnkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokifajajshĂ«rosha|gokifajajshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fajajshĂ«musha|fajajshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofajajnkshĂ«musha|gofajajnkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifajajshĂ«musha|gokifajajshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:fajajronĂŒsha|fajajronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gofajajnkronĂŒsha|gofajajnkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokifajajronĂŒsha|gokifajajronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:fajajroshĂ«sha|fajajroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gofajajnkroshĂ«sha|gofajajnkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokifajajroshĂ«sha|gokifajajroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fajajromusha|fajajromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofajajnkromusha|gofajajnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifajajromusha|gokifajajromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:fajajmunĂŒsha|fajajmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gofajajnkmunĂŒsha|gofajajnkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokifajajmunĂŒsha|gokifajajmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:fajajmushĂ«sha|fajajmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gofajajnkmushĂ«sha|gofajajnkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokifajajmushĂ«sha|gokifajajmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:fajajmurosha|fajajmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofajajnkmurosha|gofajajnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokifajajmurosha|gokifajajmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:fajaj|fajaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:fĂŠjĂŠj|fĂŠjĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hofajaj|hofajaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hofĂŠjĂŠj|hofĂŠjĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohofajaj|hohofajaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohofĂŠjĂŠj|hohofĂŠjĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒfajaj|nĂŒfajaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒfĂŠjĂŠj|nĂŒfĂŠjĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒfajaj|nĂŒnĂŒfajaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒfĂŠjĂŠj|nĂŒnĂŒfĂŠjĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻfajaj|nĂŻfajaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻfĂŠjĂŠj|nĂŻfĂŠjĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻfajaj|nĂŻnĂŻfajaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻfĂŠjĂŠj|nĂŻnĂŻfĂŠjĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lufajaj|lufajaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lufĂŠjĂŠj|lufĂŠjĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulufajaj|lulufajaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulufĂŠjĂŠj|lulufĂŠjĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lifajaj|lifajaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lifĂŠjĂŠj|lifĂŠjĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilifajaj|lilifajaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilifĂŠjĂŠj|lilifĂŠjĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kofajaj|kofajaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kofĂŠjĂŠj|kofĂŠjĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokofajaj|kokofajaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokofĂŠjĂŠj|kokofĂŠjĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kefajaj|kefajaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kefĂŠjĂŠj|kefĂŠjĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekefajaj|kekefajaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekefĂŠjĂŠj|kekefĂŠjĂŠj]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|1f1e26d}}
